item.title: UK’s security level raised to severe: what it means for our NTU community
item.description: On Thursday 30 April UK’s terrorism threat level was raised from substantial to severe. The government has advised the public to be alert and vigilant but not alarmed.

item.title: Check-in with our Next Steps survey and you could win a £100 Amazon voucher
item.description: NTU Employability is here to support you throughout your time at NTU and after you graduate.

item.title: Our top five tips to Stamp Out Stress this exam season
item.description: Unwind, recharge, and stay balanced with these stress‑management tips from our HealthyNTU team.

item.title: What’s next after your degree? Explore your postgraduate options
item.description: Whether you’ve got a clear career path in mind, or you’re still figuring it out, postgraduate study at NTU can help you take the next step.

item.title: Some of our online services unavailable from Friday 24 April until Monday 27 April
item.description: Due to essential maintenance, there will be a scheduled break in some of our online services from 5pm on Friday 24 April until 8am on Monday 27 April.

item.title: Live music, free books and more to come from NTU Arts this term
item.description: The end of the academic year might be getting closer but there are still countless opportunities to get involved in something creative with NTU Arts.

item.title: Stamp Out Stress this exam season with our fun activities and support
item.description: From therapy dogs and exercise classes, to top tips and revision planners, we have lots available to help you relax this exam season.

item.title: Live, Learn, Work
item.description: At NTU, learning is about more than a degree – it's about the person you become. Find out how we can support you through Live, Learn, Work.

item.title: Become a NTU Global Summer School student buddy
item.description: Staying in Nottingham this summer? Sign up to become a student buddy and meet students from around the world.

item.title: Complete the Postgraduate Taught Experience Survey for the chance to win £100
item.description: Postgraduate taught students – complete this survey to tell us about your time at NTU, and you could win one of five £100 Amazon vouchers*!
